description_long: This is a tall, bulbous ceramic vase with a narrow neck and a wide, flared rim, featuring a traditional blue and white color scheme. The surface is adorned with intricate hand-painted floral and geometric motifs, reminiscent of Mediterranean or Moorish pottery. Two small, curved handles are attached symmetrically on opposite sides of the neck, providing both decorative and functional elements. The body of the vase is predominantly white, with deep cobalt blue patterns that create a striking contrast. The rim and base are accentuated with solid blue bands, and the overall finish is glossy, suggesting a glazed ceramic surface. The vase appears well-crafted and in excellent condition, suitable for display in elegant urban or garden settings.
description: A tall, glossy blue and white ceramic vase with intricate floral and geometric patterns and two small handles on the neck. The vase features a flared rim and a bulbous body, exuding a traditional, decorative style.
description_view_0: Front view showing one handle and the main floral and geometric motifs on the body.
description_view_1: Side view displaying both handles and a more symmetrical view of the decorative patterns.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the opposite handle visible and repeating motifs.
description_view_3: Side view again showing both handles and the continuity of the blue and white patterns.
